resultList.dtldesc: Grab the chance to own a 4 BHK Vastu-compliant villa in Kompally, Hyderabad. This gated community combines the calm of the suburbs with the convenience of the city, offering a peaceful and green environment—perfect for families looking for a quiet and comfortable place to live.::::::Property Specifications::::::This east-facing villa is spread over a spacious 3200 sq. ft. of carpet area, providing good natural light and great cross-ventilation all around. Spread across Ground + 1 floor, the house has vitrified tile flooring and is sold without furniture, so you can get the interiors done as per your choice.::::::On the ground floor, there are two large bedrooms with en-suite western-style bathrooms, an open and sunny living space, and a nicely laid-out dining area. The kitchen features a granite platform, stainless steel sink, separate wash area, and a storeroom for convenience. The design also features a porch, giving functionality to your daily living.::::::The ground floor has a large drawing room and two other bedrooms, both of which have their own bathrooms. One of the bedrooms leads into a balcony whose view is that of a tranquil park—just right for drinking your morning coffee or relaxing at night.::::::Facilities::::::The villa includes one covered parking space, a 24-hour water supply (via both borewell and municipal sources), and 100% power backup to ensure uninterrupted living. Your safety is a top priority, with CCTV surveillance and a dedicated security guard in place. As part of a secure, gated community, this villa also offers privacy, exclusivity, and peace of mind.::::::Locality::::::Well-located, The Neighbourhood at Kompally has impeccable connectivity. The railway station is a mere 2 km distance, and traveling daily to work or elsewhere is easy with good bus, auto, and cab connectivity. Well-known schools are just around the corner, so it's the perfect home for those with children. For medical care, good hospitals and clinics are nearby. Shopping malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs are within reach, making sure everything you need is merely minutes away.::

resultList.dtldesc: Situated in the well established residential locality of Sainikpuri in Hyderabad, this 2 BHK apartment offers a comfortable living environment ideal for families and working professionals. The property has a built up area of approximately 1250 sq. ft with a carpet area of around 1053 sq. ft and is part of a ready to move residential building. Sainikpuri is known for its peaceful surroundings, greenery, and well planned residential layout, originally developed as a cooperative housing society for retired defence personnel and now considered one of the preferred residential areas in the city.Property SpecificationsThis apartment features a built up area of about 1250 sq. ft with a carpet area of approximately 1053 sq. ft. It is located on the 4th floor of a 5 storey residential building. The property is available in unfurnished condition, allowing buyers to design the interiors according to their preferences. The layout includes 2 spacious bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 1 balcony that ensures good ventilation and natural light. The kitchen is designed with a separate layout that provides convenience for everyday cooking. The flooring is finished with durable tiles that are easy to maintain. The apartment is east facing, allowing pleasant morning sunlight. One covered parking space is available with the property.FacilitiesThe building provides essential residential amenities for comfortable living. Residents benefit from lift access, reliable water supply, and power backup facilities. The property also offers covered parking and basic security provisions to ensure a convenient and safe residential environment.LocalitySainikpuri is a well connected residential neighbourhood in the northeastern part of Hyderabad under the GHMC East Zone. The locality offers good connectivity to areas such as ECIL, AS Rao Nagar, and Secunderabad through major road networks and public transport facilities. Schools, hospitals, supermarkets, restaurants, and other daily necessities are easily accessible in the surrounding area. The neighbourhood is known for its calm environment, greenery, and strong social infrastructure, making it a popular choice for residential living in Hyderabad.

With a spacious super built-up area of 5000 sqft and designed with modern living in mind, this villa is perfect for families seeking comfort and style.Property specifications and facilitiesThe villa comprises G 2 floors and is Vaastu compliant, facing East to maximize natural light and energy flow. Although unfurnished, the villa boasts beautifully finished POP ceilings. Ground Floor Features one bedroom with two bathrooms one attached and one common, both western with geysers, a spacious living room, a store room, and a normal kitchen with a platform and sink, plus an attached utility area. First Floor Contains two bedrooms with attached bathrooms both western with geysers, a living room, a puja room, and two balconies-one attached to a bedroom and the other linked to the living room, both overlooking the road and garden. Second Floor Offers one bedroom with an attached bathroom western with a geyser, a living room, a home theater room, and three balconies-one attached to the bedroom, one linked to the living room, and one connected to the home theater, all overlooking the road and park.The floors are connected via a convenient internal staircase, and the flooring is a mix of elegant vitrified tiles and marble. This villa includes covered parking and provides 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources. For added convenience, a lift is also available for easy access to all floors.LocalitySituated near the popular Heart Cup Cafe, this property is ideally located with essential amenities just a stones throw away. Schools, hospitals, and mallssupermarkets are all within 1 km, making it a family-friendly neighborhood. Banks and ATMs are nearby for your financial needs, and public transport options such as buses and autos are easily accessible. The Gundlapochampally railway station is just 1 km away, while an upcoming metro station is conveniently located 100 meters from the villa.

resultList.bcp: Welcome to Aparna Sarovar Zicon, where lifestyle meets unparalleled amenities. Imagine living in a serene lakefront setting with 80% open space, complemented by a vast 82,313 sq. ft. clubhouse that redefines community living. resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 2 BHK apartment is located in the prestigious Aparna Sarovar Zenith complex, offering an elevated lifestyle in the rapidly developing area of Nallagandla. Designed to provide a perfect blend of luxury and sustainability, this residence is ideal for professionals and families seeking a serene yet well-connected home in one of Hyderabads most sought-after gated communities.Property SpecificationsThe apartment encompasses a generous super built-up area of 1240 sq. ft. and is positioned on a higher floor, ensuring excellent cross-ventilation and an abundance of natural light throughout the day. The layout features two spacious bedrooms and two modern bathrooms, along with a well-planned living and dining area. A private balcony provides a relaxing outdoor space with views of the beautifully landscaped grounds. The interiors are finished with high-quality vitrified tiles, and the kitchen is designed for efficiency, catering to the needs of a contemporary household.FacilitiesAparna Sarovar Zenith is renowned for its world-class amenities and eco-friendly infrastructure. Residents have access to a massive clubhouse, a temperature-controlled swimming pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, and diverse sports facilities including tennis and badminton courts. The project prioritises safety and convenience with 24-hour power backup, high-speed lifts, and a comprehensive three-tier security system with CCTV surveillance. Ample reserved parking is available, and the complex includes beautifully maintained gardens, a dedicated childrens play area, and a jogging track. 3LocalitySituated in Nallagandla, the property enjoys a prime location with seamless connectivity to the IT hubs of Gachibowli and HITEC City. The neighbourhood is well-established, with the Lingampally Railway Station located just a short drive away, providing easy access to the rest of the city. The area is home to several reputable educational institutions, such as Citizens Specialty Hospital and various international schools. For daily needs and recreation, residents can visit nearby shopping centres and supermarkets, while the serene Nallagandla Lake offers a peaceful retreat within the local vicinity.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience peaceful and spacious living with this newly constructed 3 BHK villa located in the rapidly developing residential area of Mokila, Hyderabad. Designed to offer a comfortable and modern lifestyle, this ready-to-move property provides an ideal setting for families seeking privacy, generous living spaces, and a calm neighbourhood environment while still being connected to the city’s growing infrastructure.::::Property Specifications::::Built on a plot size of 288 sq. yrd with a carpet area of 2250 sq. ft, this villa is thoughtfully designed to maximise comfort and functionality. The home features three well-proportioned bedrooms and three bathrooms, ensuring convenience for family members and guests. Two balconies enhance the property by allowing ample natural light and fresh air to flow throughout the interiors. The villa also includes an additional store room, providing practical space for storage and household organisation. The property is offered unfurnished, allowing homeowners the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors according to their personal preferences and lifestyle requirements. Being east facing, the villa receives abundant morning light and is suitable for buyers who prefer homes aligned with traditional design considerations. As a newly constructed property, it reflects modern structural standards and contemporary residential planning.::::Facilities::::The villa is developed with essential residential infrastructure to support a comfortable everyday lifestyle. The property benefits from a reliable water supply and electricity connection with minimal interruptions. The layout allows convenient access and movement within the premises, while the freehold ownership provides long-term security and flexibility for the homeowner. The newly built structure ensures durability and a fresh living environment for its residents.::::Locality::::Mokila has emerged as one of the promising residential locations in the Hyderabad region due to its peaceful surroundings and improving connectivity. The area offers a calm suburban atmosphere while remaining accessible to major parts of the city. Residents benefit from proximity to schools, healthcare facilities, and daily convenience stores, making it suitable for comfortable family living. The locality is also witnessing steady development with growing infrastructure and residential communities.::::With its spacious layout, newly constructed design, and location in the developing Mokila area, this villa presents an excellent opportunity for families looking to own a comfortable and modern home in Hyderabad.
